title: Overlord
description:
Overlord is a dark fantasy and isekai anime that follows the story of Momonga, a powerful player inside a popular virtual reality game called Yggdrasil. As the game’s servers prepare to shut down permanently, Momonga decides to stay logged in until the very end while sitting alone inside the massive guild headquarters known as the Great Tomb of Nazarick.However, after the shutdown time passes, Momonga realizes that something impossible has happened. The game world has not disappeared, and the non-playable characters created by his guild members suddenly gain emotions, personalities, and self-awareness. Trapped inside the body of his in-game avatar, an all-powerful undead sorcerer known as Ainz Ooal Gown, Momonga begins exploring this mysterious new reality while trying to understand what caused the transformation.As the supreme ruler of Nazarick, Ainz commands incredibly loyal guardians who view him as a godlike being. Although he originally acts cautiously and simply wishes to gather information about the new world, his actions slowly lead to the rise of a terrifying and unstoppable empire. Kingdoms, adventurers, magic users, and entire nations become caught in the influence of Nazarick’s overwhelming military and magical power. 

Throughout the series, Ainz struggles to maintain the image of an intelligent and all-knowing ruler even when he is uncertain about many situations himself. At the same time, he searches for other possible players from Yggdrasil while attempting to protect the legacy of his former guild friends. His journey constantly balances strategic warfare, political manipulation, brutal battles, and dark humor.The anime combines fantasy, action, adventure, and psychological themes while presenting the story from the perspective of an overwhelmingly powerful anti-hero rather than traditional protagonists. It explores topics such as morality, leadership, loneliness, fear, loyalty, and the consequences of absolute power in a dangerous fantasy world.Overlord became highly popular because of its unique world-building, memorable characters, strategic storytelling, and the intimidating presence of Ainz Ooal Gown. The series is widely praised for its dark atmosphere, epic battles, detailed fantasy setting, and its refreshing approach to the isekai genre where the main character is viewed as the ultimate villain by much of the world.
